response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and knowledge-sharing — all aligned with engineering productivity. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond workshops, and his current role at Google is listed as starting in 2025 (future-dated), raising credibility concerns. Mobile platform experience is also minimal despite the role’s focus.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Strong cross-stack expertise with TypeScript, DLang, and mobile app development (iOS/Apple TV)
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Current Google role listed as starting in 2025 — appears to be a future-dated error
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems or build systems at scale
